program_objective: Run and validate the Phase 1 workflow with canonical artifacts and gate outputs.

phase_sequence.name: Foundation Hardening & Truth Baseline
phase_sequence.objective: Executable Phase 1 workflow with deterministic outputs
exit_criteria: Stable baseline lane on standardized environment
now_actions: Run make phase1-complete once blockers are triaged
workflow_focus: Execute commands and emit artifacts under build/phase1-baseline
Use phase1-status and flow-contract outputs for gate decisions

phase_handoff_rule: Do not begin a new phase until the current phase exit criteria are met and validated with canonical artifacts.
notes: This file now acts as the Phase 1 operational workflow contract.
Downstream phase planning criteria are intentionally excluded from active execution.
